name: Save 2020
short_description: Help a fellow archer to overcome these big and evil monsters that are ahead, A challenging Side scroller action - Run and Gun Game where your skills will be tested.
detailed_description:
The world needs a change, and "The Order" is willing to make it.

You embody an archer / hunter who was very calm living away from society when suddenly he was attacked by zombies.
Surprised he goes in search of his family and answers.

You will have the courage to find out truly what is happening in the world and save your family.



  • From the dark forest to the dying city, traverse multiple worlds full of dangers.
  • Face zombies, monsters, dangerous creatures, dark soldiers, and most importantly, bosses that will make you go mad.
  • Upgrade your characteristics with each completed scenario until you became a true master of the bow and arrow.
  • It is a challenging game which will make you improve your skills, that is if you want to overcome the challenges that awaits you.

Characteristics:

Dodge and Shoot: The main mechanic of "Save 2020" is to use your agility to dodge the projectiles and attacks that will come at you, then use your powerful bow to unleash a flurry of arrows which will finish off your enemies.


Improve the Archer: You can improve the damage of your arrows, firing speed, etc. Acquire skills which will be of great help in your campaign.

Hide and wait for the moment: Another mechanic that has a certain game scenario is to not letting yourself be seen, that will be lethal, use your knife to silently finish off your enemies.


Epic Boss fights: You will face powerful and resistant bosses, you will learn their multiple and distinctive attacks and you will use them against them.


100% compatible controller: You have the option to play fully with controller.

What You Get:

  • Intense and Fast Gameplay
  • That wonderful feel when after Fighting for the nth time a Boss and defeating him
  • A non complicated set of mechanics, the most important is to have Fun!
  • Minimalist set of Upgrades, Don't overthink it
  • Something to play when you just want to have Fun

What You Don't Get:

  • Tedious UI that takes hours to understand
  • Tons of unuseful items that just make space
  • A Tangled world in which you will get Stuck for hours
  • Advertisements
  • Loot Boxes

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian
*languages with full audio support
